TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: Null/missing or a three-digit numeric value that includes leading zeros 

COMMENT: If the beneficiary did not have a Part C plan for a given month, this variable will have null/missing
